'''Lieutenant Bradan''' was an officer of [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Zsinj]].

==Biography==
Bradan was a combat specialist who was originally assigned the point position of the intrusion team assigned to capture the ''[[Razor's Kiss]]''. Her job, however, was given to [[Shalla Nelprin]] in the guise of [[Shalla Nelprin|Qatya Nassin]], as the other woman was smaller and ''seemed'' less intimidating.

Bradan accompanied the rest of the team to the bridge of the ''Razor's Kiss'' and almost caught "Qatya" downloading a tracking program into the ship's main computer, but was fooled by the other's nonchalance. After authorizing the smaller woman to attack a "security detail," Bradan stayed in the bridge and was [[Death/Legends|killed]] in the attacks on the [[Executor-class Star Dreadnought/Legends|ship]].

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Iron Fist]]'' {{Ab|X-Wing: Iron Fist (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
